```tsx
import {
  ChainArbitrumIcon,
  ChainBNBIcon,
  ChainEthereumIcon,
  ChainPolygonIcon,
  ChainAvalancheIcon,
  ChainTonICon,
  ChainDogeIcon,
  ChainMorphIcon,
} from "web3-icons";

<div className={"flex gap-2"}>
  <ChainEthereumIcon width={32} height={32} />
  <ChainArbitrumIcon width={32} height={32} />
  <ChainBNBIcon width={32} height={32} />
  <ChainPolygonIcon width={32} height={32} />
  <ChainAvalancheIcon width={32} height={32} />
  <ChainTonIcon width={32} height={32} />
  <ChainDogeIcon width={32} height={32} />
  <ChainMorphIcon width={32} height={32} />
</div>;
```

```tsx
import { USDCIcon, USDTIcon, ETHIcon } from "web3-icons";

  <ETHIcon width={32} height={32} />

</div>;
```
